headline: 'Everyone's nervous': Wells Fargo CEO on how businesses and consumers feel about the economy
summary: Wells Fargo CEO Charles Scharf said on Monday that the US economy right now is "extremely strong," but he also acknowledged how bad sentiment is among Americans consumers and businesses.

headline: Q1 Earnings Kick Off: Strong Results And Record CEO Confidence Anchor The Market
summary: The Q1 2026 earnings season has started, and the early results suggest a market that is largely defying the geopolitical fog. Banks and chip names kicked off the season with robust results.

headline: Fed Independence Is Critically Important, Says Wells Fargo CEO Scharf
summary: Wells Fargo & Co. Chief Executive Officer Charlie Scharf says Federal Reserve independence is critically important, but he says President Donald Trump is allowed to have his own point of view....
